label: Read Coils & Inputs
info:
# Reading Coils and Input Registers

This example demonstrates reading different Modbus data types:
- **Coils**: Digital outputs (read/write)
- **Discrete Inputs**: Digital inputs (read-only)
- **Input Registers**: Analog inputs (read-only)
- **Holding Registers**: Analog values (read/write)

## Modbus Function Codes:
- FC01: Read Coils
- FC02: Read Discrete Inputs
- FC03: Read Holding Registers
- FC04: Read Input Registers

name: Format Coils
Format Discrete
Format Input Regs
Format Holding
Modbus Data Types
info:
## Modbus Data Types Explained:

### Digital Data:
- **Coils (FC01/FC05/FC15)**: Digital outputs, can be read and written
- **Discrete Inputs (FC02)**: Digital inputs, read-only

### Analog Data:
- **Input Registers (FC04)**: 16-bit analog inputs, read-only
- **Holding Registers (FC03/FC06/FC16)**: 16-bit analog values, can be read and written

### Common Uses:
- Coils: Relays, valves, lights
- Discrete Inputs: Switches, sensors, buttons
- Input Registers: Temperature sensors, analog inputs
- Holding Registers: Setpoints, configuration values
